title: Magic shortbow
wikitext:
{{External|rs|rsc=Magic Shortbow}} {{Infobox Item |name = Magic shortbow |image = [[File:Magic shortbow.png]] |release = [[25 March]] [[2002]] |update = Latest RuneScape News (25 March 2002) |members = Yes |quest = No |tradeable = Yes |placeholder = Yes |equipable = Yes |stackable = No |noteable = Yes |options = Wield, Drop |examine = Short and magical, but still effective. |value = 1600 |weight = 1.360 |exchange = Yes |id = 861 }} [[File:Magic shortbow detail.png|left|153x153px]] The '''Magic shortbow''' is a bow that requires level 50 [[Ranged]] in order to use and can fire [[arrows]] up to [[Amethyst arrow|amethyst]]. It is one of the few [[Shortbow (weapon)|shortbows]] in the game with a [[Special attack]]. The bow has an [[attack range]] of 7, with longrange increasing attack range by 2. To make this bow, players must use a [[magic shortbow (u)]] on a [[bow string]]. This requires 80 [[Fletching]], and grants 83 experience. They can also be received from [[hard clue scroll]]s, or as a rare drop from [[spiritual ranger]]s. The Magic shortbow can be [[Magic shortbow (i)|imbued]] by using a [[magic shortbow scroll]] on it to make a [[magic shortbow (i)]]. The imbue increases its ranged attack bonus to +75 and lowers the special attack cost to 50%. The magic shortbow is often the most powerful ranged weapon available to mid-level players. Because of its fast attack speed and ability to fire [[Rune arrow|rune]] and [[amethyst arrow]]s, it is usually an effective ranged weapon for completing Slayer tasks. The [[rune crossbow]] is a viable alternative for players who desire a shield, the special effects of [[enchanted bolts]], or the easy availability of [[broad bolts]]. The [[Dorgeshuun crossbow]] can also achieve very similar damage-per-second to a magic bow with lower-level arrows (such as steel arrows), due to its higher firing speed than normal crossbows, while using very cheap and easily-obtainable ammunition in the form of [[bone bolts]]. Despite its low max hit, the magic shortbow is popular for [[player killing]] due to the ease of stacking its damage with a more powerful melee attack for a knockout blow. ==Combat stats== {{Infobox Bonuses |astab = 0 |aslash = 0 |acrush = 0 |amagic = 0 |arange = +69 |dstab = 0 |dslash = 0 |dcrush = 0 |dmagic = 0 |drange = 0 |str = 0 |rstr = 0 |mdmg = 0 |prayer = 0 |slot = 2h |speed = 4 |attackrange = 7 |combatstyle = Bow |image = [[File:Magic shortbow equipped male.png|180px]] |altimage = [[File:Magic shortbow equipped female.png|180px]] }} {{CombatStyles|Bow|speed=4|attackrange=7}} ==Special attack== [[File:Snapshot.gif|thumb|250px|A player performing the magic shortbow's special attack, ''Snapshot''.]] This weapon also has a [[special attack]], ''Snapshot'', which will shoot two arrows in rapid succession, using 55% of a player's special attack energy. While the in-game tooltip states that ''Snapshot'' has reduced accuracy, it actually likely has an accuracy boost of \frac{10}{7} or about 43%.{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/1042029374428639232|date=18 September 2018|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/100981|archivedate=23 May 2021|quote=Looks to me like it's a 43% buff, not a nerf.}} ''Snapshot'' uses a custom form of damage calculation that does not take into account offensive Prayers (such as [[Eagle Eye]]) when determining a player's [[Maximum ranged hit#Calculating your maximum ranged hit|maximum Ranged hit]],{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/1167133164642480131|date=29 August 2019|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/102769|archivedate=23 May 2021|quote=[The special attack for rune throwing axes, magic shortbow, and magic longbow all ignore the active range boosting prayers for the special attack, and this ends up with a lower max hit during special attack. is this intentional?] They always had their own special calculations for effective accuracy/damage (...)}} but its accuracy is still affected.{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/jagexash/status/1396397301925662723|date=23 May 2021|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/101488|archivedate=23 May 2021|quote=Correct, it does now affect that spec, and every other custom attack I've seen so far.}} The following formula can be used to calculate the max hit of ''Snapshot'':

\text{Maximum Hit} =\left\lfloor 0.5+\frac{\text{(Visible Ranged Level} + 10) *(\text{Ammo Ranged Strength} +64)}{640} \right\rfloor {{efn|name=level|Only the player's visible ranged level matters. Boosts given through prayers and Void Knight armour are ignored.}} {{efn|name=stance|A stance bonus of 10 is used regardless of attack style used.}} {{efn|name=ammo|The ranged strength bonus of the player's armour and gear is ignored. Only the ranged strength bonus of the player's ammo is used.}} {{efn|name=slayer|The bonus damage usually provided by wearing a Slayer helmet (i), Salve amulet (i) or Salve amulet (ei) is ignored.}} {{notelist}} ==Creation== {{Recipe |skill1 = Fletching |skill1lvl = 80 |skill1boostable = Yes |skill1exp = 83.3 |members = Yes |ticks = 2 |mat1 = Magic shortbow (u) |mat2 = Bow string |output1 = Magic shortbow }} ==Products== {{Uses material list|Magic shortbow}} ==Item sources== {{Drop sources|Magic shortbow}} ==Used in recommended equipment== {{Used in recommended equipment|Magic shortbow}} ==Comparison between other ranged weapons== {{Ranged weapons comparison}} ==Transcript== {{Hastranscript|item}} ==Changes== {{Subject changes header}} {{Subject changes |date = 22 February 2005 |update = Wilderness Capes, and Changes |change = The cost of using the magic shortbow's special attack was increased from 35% energy to 55%. }} {{Subject changes |date = 26 January 2005 |update = Slayer Skill |change = The item was graphically updated. }} {{Subject changes |date = 14 June 2004 |update = Special Attacks |change = The item was given a special attack, ''Snapshot''. }} {{Subject changes footer}} ===Gallery (historical)=== {|style="text-align: center" cellpadding="15" |[[File:Magic shortbow detail (historical).png|center|300x150px]] |[[File:Magic shortbow detail.png|center|300x150px]] |- |[[File:Magic shortbow (historical).png|center]] |[[File:Magic shortbow.png|center]] |- |29 March 2004 ⁠–
